---
title: "ReassignmentCommands"
description: "This class can be used to build a valid submission. It provides create(String, String, String, UnassignCommand) for initial creation and methods to set optional parameters e.g withWorkflowId(String), withSubmissionId(String) etc. Usage: var submission = ReassignmentCommands.create(userId, commandId, synchronizerId, unassingnCommand) .withWorkflowId(workflowId) .with..."
---
